forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KS36QGEVVP064EKW0JDGD94B
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8d80
+project: command-service
+title: 'Builtin plugin: app commands + drag commands (port app.yaml + drag.yaml)'
+---
+## What
+
+Port `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/app.yaml` (12 commands) and `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/drag.yaml` (3 commands) to a single builtin TypeScript plugin. Both are host-shell concerns that depend on the forthcoming `app` and `window` MCP servers.
+
+App commands (12): `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help`, `app.command`, `app.palette`, `app.search`, `app.dismiss`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`, `settings.keymap.vim`, `settings.keymap.cua`, `settings.keymap.emacs`.
+
+Drag commands (3): `drag.start`, `drag.cancel`, `drag.complete`.
+
+Files:
+- `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/index.ts` — registers all 15
+
+App-level commands route through the new `app` MCP server (separate task). Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today this is React state — the backend will need to host it too, but that refactor is bigger than this task; for now, the `execute` callback can post a message to the frontend's drag state via an `app.drag` MCP operation).
+
+Keymap commands (`settings.keymap.vim` etc.) change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Preserve the existing behavior: switching keymap changes which `keys` entry the hotkey dispatcher reads.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/` discoverable
+- [ ] All 15 commands registered with original metadata
+- [ ] `app.undo` and `app.redo` exercise the undo stack end-to-end (the unified `undo_stack.yaml`)
+- [ ] `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help` route through the `app` MCP server (when registered)
+- [ ] Metadata fidelity per YAML baseline
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` — load plugin; assert all 15 registered; execute `app.undo` / `app.redo` and observe undo-stack mutation; execute keymap switches and verify the active keymap state
+- [ ] Drag commands: start → complete; assert drag state transitions land
+- [ ] Metadata fidelity table-test
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-command-service --test integration builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e` passes
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`
\ No newline at end of file

-title: 'Builtin plugin: app commands + drag commands (port app.yaml + drag.yaml)'
+title: 'Builtin plugin: app + settings + drag commands (port app.yaml + settings.yaml + drag.yaml)'
 ---
 ## What

-Port `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/app.yaml` (12 commands) and `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/drag.yaml` (3 commands) to a single builtin TypeScript plugin. Both are host-shell concerns that depend on the forthcoming `app` and `window` MCP servers.
+Port three small platform-shell YAML files into one builtin TypeScript plugin (15 commands total, all host-shell concerns).

-App commands (12): `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help`, `app.command`, `app.palette`, `app.search`, `app.dismiss`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`, `settings.keymap.vim`, `settings.keymap.cua`, `settings.keymap.emacs`.
+Source YAMLs:
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/app.yaml` — 9 commands: `app.about`, `app.help`, `app.quit`, `app.command`, `app.palette`, `app.search`, `app.dismiss`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/settings.yaml` — 3 commands: `settings.keymap.vim`, `settings.keymap.cua`, `settings.keymap.emacs`
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/drag.yaml` — 3 commands: `drag.start`, `drag.cancel`, `drag.complete`

-Drag commands (3): `drag.start`, `drag.cancel`, `drag.complete`.
+Total: 15 commands.

 Files:
-- `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/index.ts` — registers all 15
+- `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/index.ts` — registers all 15, grouped by source-file domain (`commands/app.ts`, `commands/settings.ts`, `commands/drag.ts`)

-App-level commands route through the new `app` MCP server (separate task). Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today this is React state — the backend will need to host it too, but that refactor is bigger than this task; for now, the `execute` callback can post a message to the frontend's drag state via an `app.drag` MCP operation).
+Load convention (see SDK helpers task): `load()` calls `ensureServices(this, ["commands", "app"])` before `registerCommands`. The `app` service is needed for `app.quit`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`, etc. Idempotency means other plugins also calling `ensureServices` for these names is safe.

-Keymap commands (`settings.keymap.vim` etc.) change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Preserve the existing behavior: switching keymap changes which `keys` entry the hotkey dispatcher reads.
+App-level commands route through the `app` MCP server (separate task). Keymap commands change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today React state; for now `execute` posts to the frontend's drag state via an MCP operation).

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/` discoverable
@@ -28,12 +31,15 @@
 - [ ] All 15 commands registered with original metadata
 - [ ] `app.undo` and `app.redo` exercise the undo stack end-to-end (the unified `undo_stack.yaml`)
 - [ ] `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help` route through the `app` MCP server (when registered)
-- [ ] Metadata fidelity per YAML baseline
+- [ ] Keymap switches (vim/cua/emacs) update the active keymap state and the hotkey dispatcher rebinds
+- [ ] Drag start → complete state transitions land
+- [ ] Metadata fidelity per YAML baseline (every field for every command)

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` — load plugin; assert all 15 registered; execute `app.undo` / `app.redo` and observe undo-stack mutation; execute keymap switches and verify the active keymap state
-- [ ] Drag commands: start → complete; assert drag state transitions land
-- [ ] Metadata fidelity table-test
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` — load plugin; assert all 15 registered with metadata fidelity; execute `app.undo` / `app.redo` and observe undo-stack mutation
+- [ ] Keymap switching test: execute `settings.keymap.vim`; verify the active keymap state; execute `settings.keymap.cua`; verify the switch
+- [ ] Drag-cycle test: `drag.start` → `drag.complete`; assert state machine progressed
+- [ ] Metadata fidelity table-test across all 15 commands
 - [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-command-service --test integration builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e` passes

 ## Workflow

-Source YAMLs:

+App commands (12): `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help`, `app.command`, `app.palette`, `app.search`, `app.dismiss`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`, `settings.keymap.vim`, `settings.keymap.cua`, `settings.keymap.emacs`.

Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today this is React state — the backend will need to host it too, but that refactor is bigger than this task; for now, the `execute` callback can post a message to the frontend's drag state via an `app.drag` MCP operation).

-App-level commands route through the `app` MCP server (separate task). Keymap commands change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today React state; for now `execute` posts to the frontend's drag state via an MCP operation).
+Keymap commands (`settings.keymap.vim` etc.) change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Preserve the existing behavior: switching keymap changes which `keys` entry the hotkey dispatcher reads.

@@ -25,22 +26,27 @@
 Files:
 - `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/index.ts` — registers all 15, grouped by source-file domain (`commands/app.ts`, `commands/settings.ts`, `commands/drag.ts`)

-Load convention (see SDK helpers task): `load()` calls `ensureServices(this, ["commands", "app"])` before `registerCommands`. The `app` service is needed for `app.quit`, `app.undo`, `app.redo`, etc. Idempotency means other plugins also calling `ensureServices` for these names is safe.
+Load convention: `load()` calls `ensureServices(this, ["commands", "app", "ui_state", "store"])` before `registerCommands`. Backend routing per the catalog:
+- `app.quit`/`app.about`/`app.help` → `app` server
+- `app.undo`/`app.redo` → **`store` server** (`store.undo`/`store.redo`) — undo/redo are store-layer, not app-shell
+- `app.command`/`app.palette`/`app.search`/`app.dismiss` → `ui_state` server (UI toggles)
+- `settings.keymap.*` → `ui_state` `SetKeymapMode`
+- `drag.*` → `ui_state` `DragStart`/`DragCancel`/`DragComplete`

-App-level commands route through the `app` MCP server (separate task). Keymap commands change the active keymap — this affects how the palette/hotkey wiring task resolves `keys` on `list command`. Drag commands route through whatever state machine hosts drag (today React state; for now `execute` posts to the frontend's drag state via an MCP operation).
+Keymap commands change the active keymap — affects how the palette/hotkey wiring resolves `keys` on `list command`.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/` discoverable
 - [ ] All 15 commands registered with original metadata
-- [ ] `app.undo` and `app.redo` exercise the undo stack end-to-end (the unified `undo_stack.yaml`)
-- [ ] `app.quit`, `app.about`, `app.help` route through the `app` MCP server (when registered)
-- [ ] Keymap switches (vim/cua/emacs) update the active keymap state and the hotkey dispatcher rebinds
-- [ ] Drag start → complete state transitions land
+- [ ] `app.undo`/`app.redo` invoke the `store` server and revert across all stores (entity/view/perspective) via the one shared stack
+- [ ] `app.quit`/`about`/`help` route through the `app` server
+- [ ] Keymap switches (vim/cua/emacs) update active keymap state via `ui_state`; hotkey dispatcher rebinds
+- [ ] Drag start → complete state transitions land via `ui_state`
 - [ ] Metadata fidelity per YAML baseline (every field for every command)

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` — load plugin; assert all 15 registered with metadata fidelity; execute `app.undo` / `app.redo` and observe undo-stack mutation
-- [ ] Keymap switching test: execute `settings.keymap.vim`; verify the active keymap state; execute `settings.keymap.cua`; verify the switch
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` — load plugin; assert all 15 registered with metadata fidelity; execute `app.undo`/`app.redo` and observe the shared-stack revert (a kanban edit reverts)
+- [ ] Keymap switching test: execute `settings.keymap.vim`; verify active keymap; switch to `cua`; verify
 - [ ] Drag-cycle test: `drag.start` → `drag.complete`; assert state machine progressed
 - [ ] Metadata fidelity table-test across all 15 commands
 - [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-command-service --test integration builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e` passes
